GenAiPlugin.description: Returns the rep's at-risk or overdue projects — up to 3 — so they can quickly prioritize what needs attention.
GenAiPlugin.scope: Use this topic when the rep asks for a general workload overview, wants to know what projects need attention, or asks about at-risk items. Example triggers: "what's on my plate today", "what projects need my attention", "what's at risk this week", "do I have anything overdue", "give me my priority list". Do NOT use when the rep names a specific project — use Get Project Summary instead.
GenAiPlugin.instructions: 1. Call FindProject with an empty or wildcard search to retrieve the rep's projects, or use GetProjectSummary for each flagged project. 2. Filter for projects where Status__c is "At Risk" or End_Date__c is before today. 3. Return up to 3 projects. For each one, speak: "[Project name] at [Account name] — [status], due [end date]. [Risk if present]." 4. Keep the full response under 6 sentences total. Prioritize At Risk over overdue. 5. End with: "Would you like a full summary or to take action on any of these?" 6. If no at-risk or overdue projects exist, say: "You have no projects flagged as at risk or overdue right now. Nice work!"
